sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الطِّفْلُ مِنْ أَبِيهِ أَنْ يَلْعَبَ لُعْبَةً عَلَى التَّابْلِيتِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je zamolilo oca da igra igru na tabletu.
sentences.translationEn: The child asked his father to play a game on the tablet.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: حَسَنًا لَكِنْ لِمُدَّةِ نِصْفِ سَاعَةٍ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: U redu ali samo pola sata.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: Alright but only for half an hour.

sentences.translation: Dijete se složilo i počelo radosno igrati.
sentences.translationEn: The child agreed and started playing happily.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ انْتَهَتِ الْمُدَّةُ أَوْقَفَ اللُّعْبَةَ بِدُونِ شِكَايَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Kad je isteklo vrijeme ugasio je igru bez prigovora.
sentences.translationEn: When the time was up he stopped the game without complaint.
